events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate scenario: field method less tidy than preferred shop approach but matches listed product instructions and project requirement. No local amendment forbids. Reference material OEM specs. Work stage in-progress. Need choose practical compliant course. Since matches instructions and requirements, decision pass. Risk low. Component conditions none. Findings maybe field method acceptable. Actions none immediate. Rationale. References OEM specs. Need fill all fields. percent_complete maybe 50? In-progress. value 0. sound_source empty? Schema string, maybe "" when not asked. event_time 0.0, rate 0.0, order empty list, workable empty list. Need ensure valid JSON.
